MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF THE PETITION OF HIRECOUNSEL LOS ANGELES, INC. FOR ORDER FOR PRE-LITIGATION DISCOVERY

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF THE PETITION OF HIRECOUNSEL LOS ANGELES' VERIFIED PETITION FOR ORDER FOR PRE-LITIGATION DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. PETITIONER HIRECOUNSEL LOS ANGELES, INC., A SUBSIDIARY OF HC2, INC. DBA HIRECOUNSEL ("HIRE COUNSEL") SHALL HAVE THE RIGHT TO ISSUE A DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR THE PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS TO CRAIGSLIST, INC., PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 2020.410 ET SEQ. THIS SUBPOENA SHALL BE ISSUED UNDER THE CASE NAME "HIRECOUNSEL LOS ANGELES, INC. V. ANONYMOUS POSTER" AND UNDER THE CASE NUMBER CPF-14-513576. THE REQUIREMENT THAT HIRE COUNSEL PROVIDE A CONSUMER NOTICE IS WAIVED. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM SHAPIRO, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.=(302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Verified Petition For Order For Pre-Litigation Discovery
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Andrea L. Fellion, Esq. of Ogletree Deakins (415-536-3416) for HireCounsel Los Angeles, Inc., Petitioner and Moving party.
No other appearance in this matter.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows: PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF THE PETITION OF HIRECOUNSEL LOS ANGELES' Verified Petition For Order For Pre-Litigation Discovery is Granted. Petitioner HireCounsel Los Angeles, Inc., a subsidiary of HC2, Inc. dba HireCounsel ("Hire Counsel") shall have the right to issue a Deposition Subpoena for the Production of BUsiness REcords to Craigslist, Inc., pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 2020.410 et seq. This subpoena shall be issued under the case name "HireCounsel Los Angeles, Inc. v. Anonymous Poster" and under the case number CPF-14-513576. The requirement that Hire Counsel provide a Consumer Notice is waived. Order is signed in open Court. Judge Pro Tem: William Shapiro, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported.=(302/JPT)
